Important Dates

WhenTrackWhat
Fri 15 Aug 2025 SCAM Research TrackCamera-ready
Fri 15 Aug 2025 SCAM Engineering TrackCamera-ready
Fri 15 Aug 2025 Artifact Evaluation / ROSENotifications
Wed 30 Jul 2025 SCAM Engineering TrackAuthor notification
Wed 30 Jul 2025 SCAM Research TrackAuthor notification
Sun 27 Jul 2025 Industry TrackCamera-ready Submission for Papers and 1-Pager Talks
Sun 27 Jul 2025 Tool Demonstration TrackCamera-ready Submission
Sun 27 Jul 2025 Doctoral SymposiumCamera-ready Submission
Sun 27 Jul 2025 Research Papers TrackCamera-Ready Submission
Sun 27 Jul 2025 NIER TrackCamera-ready Submission
Fri 25 Jul 2025 Artifact Evaluation / ROSESubmission Deadline
Wed 23 Jul 2025 Registered ReportsAuthors submit their accepted RR report to arXiv or SSRN
Sun 20 Jul 2025 Registered ReportsNotification of Stage 1
Mon 14 Jul 2025 Journal First TrackAuthor Notification
Mon 14 Jul 2025 Technical BriefingsAcceptance Notification
Mon 11 Aug 23:13 - Sat 12 Jul 23:13 2025 Artifact Evaluation / ROSEAuthor response period
Fri 11 Jul 2025 NIER TrackAuthor Notification
Fri 11 Jul 2025 Doctoral SymposiumAuthor Notification
Thu 10 Jul 2025 Registered ReportsAuthors submit a response letter and revised report
Mon 7 Jul 2025 Tool Demonstration TrackAuthor Notification
Mon 30 Jun 2025 Industry TrackPaper and Talk Proposal Notification
Fri 27 Jun 2025 Registered ReportsAuthors receive reviews
Mon 16 Jun 2025 Doctoral SymposiumPaper Submission
Mon 16 Jun 2025 Journal First TrackPaper Submission
Wed 11 Jun 2025 SCAM Engineering TrackPaper submission
Mon 9 Jun 2025 SCAM Research TrackPaper submission
Fri 6 Jun 2025 Technical BriefingsProposals Submission
Thu 5 Jun 2025 SCAM Research TrackAbstract submission
Thu 5 Jun 2025 Industry TrackTalk Proposal Submission
Thu 5 Jun 2025 Research Papers TrackFinal Notification
Thu 5 Jun 2025 NIER TrackPaper Submission
Sun 1 Jun 2025 Tool Demonstration TrackPaper Submission
Fri 30 May 2025 NIER TrackAbstract Submission
Tue 27 May 2025 Registered ReportsAuthors submit their initial report
Sun 25 May 2025 Industry TrackPaper Submission
Sun 18 May 2025 Industry TrackPaper Abstract Submission
Thu 8 - Thu 15 May 2025 Research Papers Track Author Response Period
Wed 7 May 2025 Research Papers TrackEarly Decisions Notification
Thu 13 Mar 2025 Research Papers TrackPaper Submission
Thu 6 Mar 2025 Research Papers TrackAbstract Submission
